name: wildCardSearch
description: Performs case-insensitive wildcard search across object properties, useful for filtering lists and tables.
usage_guidelines: Searches all object properties by default.
Use specifyKey to search specific property only.

params.name: list
params.description: Array of objects to search through.

params.name: specifyKey
params.description: Specific object key to search in. If omitted, searches all keys.

return_value.description: Filtered array containing only matching items.

Dont: Don't use for very large datasets (use server-side)
Don't forget to handle null values
